name: Diabetic Double Fudge Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the margarine, evaporated skim milk, salt, and vanilla until fluffy.
2. Stir in the cocoa powder and powdered sugar replacement. Knead or work with hands until the dough is smooth.
3. Form the dough into 60 small balls.
4. Dip each ball into chocolate, allowing it to cool completely.
5. Dip again and let cool.
Note: Exchanges 1 ball: 1/3 bread, 1/2 fat, calories 50. Source: Diabetic Candy, Cookie and Dessert Cookbook by MaryJane Finsand.
